stemHtml: Two aircraft are flying in the same area. Aircraft A is aware that it is being overtaken. The pilot of aircraft A checks at two o'clock for aircraft B and notices a red light, and after a while a white light. Where is aircraft B in relation to aircraft A?

options.a: Aircraft B is to the right of aircraft A.
options.b: Aircraft B is to the left of aircraft A.
options.c: The position of aircraft B cannot be determined.
options.d: Aircraft B is either to the left or to the right of aircraft A.
